sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113562" key="xeiragriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειραγρ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113562.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffering from</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χειράγρα,</foreign> cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
